reasoning: Based on recent predictions from the Opta Supercomputer for the 2025-26 French Ligue 1 season (published August 13, 2025), Nice is projected to finish 6th with an average of 50.7 points, trailing the clear favorite PSG (projected 78.7 points). PSG is given a 78.7% chance of winning the title outright, with teams like Lille, Monaco, Marseille, and Lyon all projected to finish ahead of Nice. The latest Polymarket odds prior to this forecast assigned Nice a 1% chance (0.01) of winning. Given these very low probabilities and the structural hurdle of overcoming teams far better equipped, the probability of Nice winning the league is extremely low. Bound by the 0.02 minimum limit, I forecast 0.02.
